name: Barbell Bench Press
description: A classic upper-body strength exercise that targets the chest, shoulders, and triceps.
steps: Lie flat on the bench with your feet planted firmly on the ground.
Grip the barbell slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Lower the bar slowly to your mid-chest.
Press the bar back up to the starting position.

name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
description: An isolation exercise that targets the lateral deltoids.
steps: Stand with a dumbbell in each hand, resting by your sides.
Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, raise the weights out to the side until your arms are parallel with the floor.
Lower the weights back down slowly.
